memory_text: Looking out my apartment window at the NYC skyline at night, I sometimes get overwhelmed by the scale of the tech industry. I don't just want to be another SWE; I want to be architecting the ML systems that run those skyscrapers.
proactive_hook: Does living near a major tech hub motivate you, or do you find it adds unnecessary pressure?

memory_text: I caught a reflection of myself in my monitor at 2 AM the other night, just staring blankly at a failed AWS deployment log. It made me realize I need to get better at knowing when to step away from the keyboard.
proactive_hook: What is your personal physical indicator that tells you it is time to stop working for the day?
